docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $650.00 FILED BY PEREZ LEMUS, ANANDY ANTONIO AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCISCO RODRIGUEZ, MARIA LUISA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-09-2025 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PEREZ LEMUS, ANANDY ANTONIO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-09-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-18-2025 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ANANDY ANTONIO PEREZ LEMUS IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA LUISA FRANCISCO RODRIGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JOHN TRUE; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER TO CONTINUE FOR PROOF OF SERVICE.

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE BY VISITING JUDGE CARRIE ZEPEDA. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF ANANDY ANTONIO PEREZ LEMUS IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT MARIA LUISA FRANCISCO RODRIGUEZ IS NOT PRESENT. CLERK:M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
